hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER: Before finalising this plan, apply the security-guidance skill. Identify all security-sensitive operations (input handling, auth, data persistence, crypto, file I/O, network, access control) and include OWASP ASVS requirements for each in the plan.'
echo 'REMINDER: When creating tasks, consider whether any involve security-sensitive operations. If so, add an explicit task to apply the security-guidance skill before implementing that work.'

echo 'REMINDER: Before writing this code, apply the security-guidance skill. Check whether this change touches any security-sensitive operations and ensure the implementation satisfies the relevant OWASP ASVS requirements.'
